title: 2nd SMP Pack for my server
description: A modpack made for slightly harder difficulty & exploration. Many ambience mods included, not to mention things like Create, Valkyrien skies, & Ice and Fire.
body:
Modpack that adds some difficulty and has an emphasis on exploring, tons of ambience mods, & mods like Create, Valkyrien skies, & Ice and Fire, Weather2 is also included for some added difficulty.

Currently there are 165 mods, 48 of which are only required on the client-side.

The modpack does start with shaders enabled automatically so if you have a weak PC you should turn them off before starting a world or joining a server, but this modpack is pretty well optimized for what it is. I recommend allocating 4-6gb of RAM but you can probably get by with 2gb.

There's also nuclear weapons and missiles.

Modlist below:
